location: Purchased for 2,500 Runes from Pidia, Carian Servant, who stands on a balcony above the Manor Lower Level Site of Grace in Caria Manor. Reached by dropping down the cliffs on the southeast side of the Three Sisters sub-area rather than through the manor's front gate.
tactics: Drop down the cliffside from the southeastern edge of the Three Sisters area to reach Pidia's balcony rather than fighting through the front of Caria Manor.
If you miss him or he's killed, his Bell Bearing can later be given to the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold to unlock the same purchase there.
2,500 Runes is expensive for early Liurnia — worth grabbing once you're already exploring the area rather than rushing for it.
lore: An oversized roundshield wrapped in black leather and fur-lined for warmth, decorated with a polar star picked out in gold rivets.

builds.name: Frost-resistant tank
builds.why: Unique 45% negation against Frostbite buildup versus the usual 22%, making it a strong situational pick against frost-heavy enemies and areas.
